name: Devanshu Rajak
title: Senior Test Engineer | QA Automation Engineer
summary: Senior Test Engineer with 5+ years of E2E QA at Amdocs across Telecom Billing, AR, Collections, and CSM. Led Rainbow Project (1,200+ scenarios, team of 7, on-time delivery) and currently spearheading WBPM PH3 (3,200+ test cases, 7-8 engineers). Skilled in Selenium WebDriver (Java), TestNG, Maven, REST Assured, POM, Jenkins, and CI/CD. Built personal Selenium automation framework on GitHub.

experience.title: Senior Test Engineer
bullets: Spearheading E2E QA for WBPM PH3 — 3,200+ test cases across AR, Billing, Collection, and Batch with full lifecycle ownership.
Managing and mentoring 7-8 QA engineers; driving task allocation, progress tracking, and quality standards.
Designing SQL data-validation queries for billing accuracy; authoring stakeholder release reports.

experience.title: Software Test Engineer
bullets: Led Rainbow Project — 1,200+ test scenarios, team of 6-7, on-time delivery; no critical defects reported post-release; management recognition.
COBOL to C migration testing; caught critical defects in billing calculations and AR financing reporting before production.
REST/SOAP API testing via Postman and SoapUI; validated key integration touchpoints pre-release.
Scaled QA to a structured 7-member team; established test processes adopted project-wide.

experience.title: Software Test Engineer
bullets: E2E testing across Billing and AR (Brite Bill, RTB) in high-volume batch environments.
COBOL to C migration integration testing; SQL validation ensuring consistent data behaviour post-migration.
Regression and smoke suites using UFT; improved coverage and reduced manual regression effort.
Recognized for exceeding performance goals — BELL Telecom performance award.

projects.name: OrangeHRM Selenium Framework
projects.description: Selenium + Java + TestNG + Maven with Page Object Model; DriverFactory, WaitUtils, externalised config, ExtentReports. Data-driven suite (TestNG DataProvider) covering Login, Dashboard, Timesheet; smoke/regression via Maven Surefire profiles.

education.institution: Sri Ram Institute of Technology, Jabalpur, MP

certifications: Gen-AI & Green by Design — Amdocs internal
awards: Management Recognition (2026) — Rainbow, Billing, Satellite-to-Mobile, Wearable projects at Rogers Telecom.
Performance Excellence Award (2021–2023) — Exceeded goals at BELL Telecom.
